tagline: Portable agentic-engineering operating doctrine. The conductor scopes, plans, prompts, audits, and verifies; the coding agent implements locally; verification proves with command evidence.

files.name: 00-README-project-files.md
files.description: Index, upload order, and setup for the project files.

files.name: 01-conductor-doctrine.md
files.description: The conductor role, Green/Red lanes, HALT behavior, verify-before-claiming.

files.name: 07-safety-and-scrub.md
files.description: Safety posture, public-operation boundaries, and scrub rules.

files.name: 02-coding-standards.md
files.description: Generic full-stack engineering standards the output is judged against.

files.name: 03-driving-coding-agents.md
files.description: The task template, prompt patterns, and supervision rules.

files.name: 05-qa-and-debug.md
files.description: Generic QA, verification, and debugging patterns.

files.name: 06-skills-and-routing.md
files.description: Skill catalog and routing; GStack as a referenced third-party pack.

files.name: 08-daily-workflow.md
files.description: The GStack-native start / work / close session loop.

files.name: 09-codex-and-agent-tooling.md
files.description: Optional Codex CLI / multi-agent tooling guidance and install policy.

files.name: 10-learn-and-update-loop.md
files.description: The learn loop, tool-freshness checks, and memory destinations.

files.name: 11-command-templates.md
files.description: Generic /standup, /standdown, /learn, /dream command templates, the no-hardcoded-path rule, and a smoke-test checklist.

files.name: 12-obsidian-cockpit.md
files.description: Optional private cockpit-layer doctrine: vault privacy, handoff cards, and the public/private boundary.

instructions_file.name: PROJECT-INSTRUCTIONS.md
instructions_file.description: Copy-ready block for the ChatGPT Project Instructions field (becomes PROJECT-INSTRUCTIONS.txt in the package).

companion_sources.note: GStack is one companion among several. All companions are referenced, license-aware, and user-approved; never vendored. See docs/SKILL_STACK_SETUP.md.

gstack.relationship: Referenced third-party operating layer. Command names and operating rules only; never copy skill bodies. Brandon's Kung Fu stays the doctrine.
